"'''The Unseen Planets of Episode II'''" was an article written by [[Daniel Wallace]] for [[Star Wars Insider 80]], which featured five planets (and moons) that were only in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']] through dialogue. ''Note: One of them, [[Shadda-Bi-Boran/Legends|Shadda-Bi-Boran]] was only inferred to, not heard, and in a deleted scene of the film.''

==Contents==
These are five worlds were explored in the article. They are accompanied by the quote that mentioned them in the film.
*[[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] - ''"That's possible, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|he's]] just returned from a border dispute on Ansion." - [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]''
*[[Shadda-Bi-Boran/Legends|Shadda-Bi-Boran]] - ''Inferred'' ''"That was when I went with a relief group." - [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]''
*[[Bogden/Legends|Bogden]] - ''"I was recruited by a man called [[Dooku/Legends|Tyranus]] on [[Kohlma|one of the moons]] of Bogden." - [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]''
*[[Subterrel/Legends|Subterrel]] - ''"I ain't seen [[Mk I Saberdart|one of these]] since I was prospectin' on Subterrel, beyond the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]." - [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]]''
*[[Rishi/Legends|Rishi]] - ''"I'd say about um, twelve [[Parsec/Legends|parsecs]] outside the [[Rishi Maze/Legends|Rishi Maze]]." - Dexter Jettster''
